message:
fix(fts): strip SQL comment markers (-- /* */) from FTS5 queries

sanitize_fts_query() was passing through double-dash and block comment
markers, which are SQL injection vectors with no FTS5 meaning.
Discovered by proptest with minimal failing input "--a".

Adds targeted unit test for all three marker types.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
